short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · next earnings cycle)
bullets: Run-rate $17.19B in FY2026 Q1, +21.7% YoY — accelerating trajectory entering the next print.
Next-quarter consensus: $17.10B (-0.5% vs current Q) — set by 30 broker contributors.
EPS consensus next qtr: $1.85.
Margin context: 21.6% net margin (31.8% op margin) — expansion likely.
Next earnings: 2026-09-09 — primary catalyst for the short-term window.
short_term.takeaway: Going into the next earnings print, the setup is constructive — consensus is achievable based on current run-rate.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · multi-year setup)
bullets: TTM revenue $62B — in cyclical drawdown.
Sell-side: FY1 $63B → FY2 $76B (+20.4% multi-year top-line implied).
Forward EBIT margin: 28.0% — structural premium business over the long-cycle view.
6-quarter run-rate CAGR: +22.7% — the secular trajectory the market is pricing.
FCF generation $12.8B/qtr funds long-term capital return optionality (buybacks/dividends/M&A).
Sector thesis (Information Technology): Multi-year AI/cloud capex cycle remains the dominant secular theme.
long_term.takeaway: Long-cycle thesis is intact if growth durability + margin expansion both hold.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–30 days · trading window)
bullets: Price $188.16 vs SMA50 $166.02 (+13.3%) — short-term trend is bullish (price holding above the near-term moving average).
RSI(14): 68.3 — constructive momentum.
MACD: 6.65 vs signal 7.69 — bearish crossover.
30-day return: +0.4% — directional bias entering the next 4 weeks.
Bollinger band position: 62% of band width (band width 24.6% — normal).
Near-term S/R: resistance ~$193.8, support ~$182.52. 27% of 52w range (low $136.48 → high $328.33).
short_term.takeaway: Short-term trader bias: long (trend + momentum aligned bullish).

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ days · positioning window)
bullets: Price $188.16 vs SMA200 $208.63 (-9.8%) — long-term trend is in **downtrend**.
Moving average regime: Death cross active (SMA50 < SMA200) — institutional trend filter bearish.
1-year return: +17.9% — compounder pace.
Drawdown from 52w high: -42.7% — bear-market drawdown (contrarian setup).
Cycle S/R: long-term resistance $328.33 (52w high), structural support $136.48 (52w low).
90-day return: +28.8% — positive intermediate-term momentum.
long_term.takeaway: Long-term positioning: wait for a trend-confirmation breakout / breakdown before sizing up.

short_term.title: Short-term view (0–45 DTE · front-month tactical)
bullets: Front-month ATM IV: 70.2% — elevated (premium-selling favored).
Put/Call OI: 0.80 — balanced flow.
30-day implied move: ±18.5% ($153.38 – $222.94) — the 1-σ range the options market is pricing.
ATM skew: -2.26pp — call skew (upside bid — bullish positioning).
Front-month OI cluster: $200.0 — likely magnet / pin-risk for expiry.
short_term.strategy: Iron condor 30 DTE: short $179 put / short $198 call (wings 5% wide). Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling with capped risk both sides.

long_term.title: Long-term view (90+ DTE · LEAPS / structural)
bullets: Back-month avg IV (90+ DTE): 60.1% across 8 expiries.
Available long-dated expiries: 8 dates spanning 93–611 DTE.
90-day implied move: ±30.6% ($130.65 – $245.67).
212-day implied move: ±46.2% ($101.14 – $275.18) — the long-dated 1-σ range.
Sell-side PT vs options-implied range: consensus $290 (+54.1% upside). Compare to the 90+ DTE implied range above.
Term structure in backwardation (-10.1pp front→back) — near-term event premium; long-dated vol cheaper.
long_term.strategy: Sell 6-month strangle: short $169 put / short $207 call. Range-bound + high IV → premium-selling on both sides; profits if spot stays within ±10%; manage with rolls or assignment.
